title: Loss of embeddedness for the one-phase quasistationary Stefan problem in 2D
summary:
We provide an example for a smooth and embedded initial state that looses
embeddedness in finite time when evolving according to the quasistationary
Stefan problem with Gibbs-Thomson correction and kinetic undercooling in 2D.

AI.tldr: 构造了一个光滑嵌入的初始状态，在二维准稳态Stefan问题（含Gibbs-Thomson修正和动力学过冷）演化下，在有限时间内失去嵌入性
AI.motivation: 研究相界面演化中嵌入性保持问题，针对带有Gibbs-Thomson修正和动力学过冷的准稳态Stefan问题，探索光滑嵌入初始状态是否可能在有限时间内失去嵌入性
AI.techniques: 构造性方法，通过设计特定的初始界面形状，分析其在Stefan问题演化下的行为，证明嵌入性在有限时间内被破坏
AI.main_theorems: 存在光滑嵌入的初始状态，在二维准稳态Stefan问题（含Gibbs-Thomson修正和动力学过冷）演化下，在有限时间内失去嵌入性
AI.significance: 揭示了相界面演化中嵌入性可能被破坏的现象，对理解相变界面拓扑变化和Stefan问题的正则性理论具有重要意义

title: On Singular Integrals and Quantitative Rectifiability in Parabolic Space and the Heisenberg Group
summary:
David and Semmes proved that if all CZOs (of suitable dimension) are bounded
with respect to an Ahlfors regular measure, then the measure is uniformly
rectifiable. We extend this theorem to the parabolic space and the first
Heisenberg group.

AI.tldr: 将David-Semmes定理从欧氏空间推广到抛物空间和第一海森堡群
AI.motivation: David和Semmes证明了在欧氏空间中，如果所有适当维度的Calderón-Zygmund算子关于一个Ahlfors正则测度有界，则该测度是一致可矫正的。本文旨在将该重要定理推广到更一般的几何框架中。
AI.techniques: 使用抛物空间和第一海森堡群上的调和分析技术，推广Calderón-Zygmund算子理论，分析Ahlfors正则测度与一致可矫正性的关系
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在抛物空间和第一海森堡群上，如果所有适当维度的Calderón-Zygmund算子关于一个Ahlfors正则测度有界，则该测度是一致可矫正的
AI.significance: 将经典的David-Semmes定理推广到非欧几何框架，扩展了调和分析与几何测度论在齐次群和抛物空间中的应用，为这些空间中的奇异积分理论提供了新的几何刻画

title: Statistically stationary solutions to the stochastic isentropic compressible Euler equations with linear damping
summary:
We study the long time behavior of isentropic compressible Euler equations
with linear damping driven by a white-in-time noise, on a one-dimensional
torus. We prove the existence of a statistically stationary solution in the
class of weak martingale entropy solutions for any adiabatic constant
$\gamma>1$, which satisfies an associated entropy inequality. To establish this
result, we use a multi-level approximation scheme consisting of a truncation
parameter $R$ and an artificial viscosity parameter $\epsilon$. The truncated
system preserves the structure of the regularized system with the artificial
viscosity, thereby providing key properties such as an invariant region and
non-existence of vacuum at the approximate level. These properties allow us to
construct an invariant measure for the approximate system in both $R$ and
$\epsilon$ associated to a Feller semigroup for the well-posed dynamics of the
approximate system for any $\gamma > 1$. This gives us a statistically
stationary solution for the approximate problem, which we then successively
pass to the limit as $R \to \infty$ and as $\epsilon \to 0$ to obtain a
statistically stationary solution to the original stochastic system. Our
analysis is novel, using new techniques for establishing uniform bounds on
entropies of all orders, which allow us to pass to the limit in the parameters.
We believe that this result is a valuable step towards further understanding
the long-time statistical behavior of the stochastic Euler equations in one
spatial dimension.

AI.tldr: 证明了带线性阻尼和随机驱动的可压缩欧拉方程在一维环面上存在弱鞅熵解的统计平稳解。
AI.motivation: 研究带随机驱动的可压缩欧拉方程的长时间统计行为，这是理解随机流体动力学系统长期演化的关键问题。
AI.techniques: 采用多层次逼近方案：截断参数R和人工粘性参数ε，利用不变区域和真空不存在性，构造近似系统的Feller半群和不变测度。
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意绝热常数γ>1，证明了带线性阻尼和白噪声驱动的可压缩欧拉方程存在满足熵不等式的弱鞅熵解形式的统计平稳解。
AI.significance: 首次为随机可压缩欧拉方程建立了统计平稳解的存在性，为理解一维随机流体动力学系统的长期统计行为迈出了重要一步。

title: Non-uniqueness of positive solutions for supercritical semilinear heat equations without scale invariance
summary:
We establish nonuniqueness of solutions for Cauchy problems of semilinear
heat equations with a wide class of nonlinearities. Specifically, we consider
\[ \begin{cases} \partial_tu-\Delta u=f(u), & x\in\mathbb{R}^N,\ t>0,\\
u(x,0)=u_0(x), & x\in\mathbb{R}^N, \end{cases} \] where $N>2$. We assume that
the growth rate of $f$ is less than the Joseph-Lundgren exponent for $N>10$ and
it satisfies certain assumptions guaranteeing a positive radial singular
stationary solution $u^*$. We prove that if $u_0=u^*$, then the problem has at
least two positive solutions, namely $u^*$ and $u(t)$ which satisfies $u(t)\in
L_{loc}^{\infty}(0,t_0;L^{\infty}(\mathbb{R}^N))$ for some $t_0>0$ and $$
u(t)\to u^*\quad\text{in}\ L^{\gamma}_{ul}(\mathbb{R}^N)\quad\text{as}\ t\to
0^+ $$ for $1\le \gamma<N(p_f-1)/2$, where $p_f:=\lim_{u\to\infty}uf'(u)/f(u)$
is a growth rate of $f$. Hence, nonuniqueness problem can be reduced to the
existence problem of a positive radial singular stationary solution. The method
of construction of $u(t)$ is based on the monotonicity argument.
Transformations of forward self-similar solutions for $f(u)=u^p$ and $e^u$ play
a crucial role.

AI.tldr: 证明了半线性热方程在奇异稳态解初值条件下存在至少两个正解，从而建立了非唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究半线性热方程解的唯一性问题，特别是当初值取奇异稳态解时，探索解的非唯一性现象
AI.techniques: 单调性论证方法，利用前向自相似解的变换，特别针对f(u)=u^p和e^u的情况
AI.main_theorems: 当初值u₀=u*（奇异稳态解）时，问题至少存在两个正解：奇异稳态解u*和另一个解u(t)，且u(t)在局部L∞空间中收敛到u*
AI.significance: 将非唯一性问题简化为奇异稳态解的存在性问题，为半线性热方程解的唯一性理论提供了新的视角和方法

title: Quantitative homogenization of Hamilton--Jacobi equations on perforated domains with Dirichlet boundary conditions
summary:
We study the periodic homogenization of convex Hamilton-Jacobi equations on
perforated domains with Dirichlet boundary conditions. By analyzing the optimal
control representation of the solutions and the properties of the metric
function associated with the running cost, we establish the optimal convergence
rate $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon)$ for homogenization. A key aspect of our
approach is the treatment of the singularity that arises when the optimal path
does not fully utilize the available time.

AI.tldr: 建立了穿孔域上凸Hamilton-Jacobi方程周期均匀化的最优收敛率$\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon)$
AI.motivation: 研究穿孔域上具有Dirichlet边界条件的凸Hamilton-Jacobi方程的周期均匀化问题，这类问题在材料科学、多孔介质流动和最优控制中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 利用解的最优控制表示，分析运行成本相关的度量函数性质，处理最优路径未充分利用可用时间时产生的奇异性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了均匀化的最优收敛率为$\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon)$，这是穿孔域上凸Hamilton-Jacobi方程周期均匀化的精确收敛率估计
AI.significance: 为穿孔域上Hamilton-Jacobi方程的均匀化理论提供了精确的收敛率估计，深化了对多尺度问题中奇异性处理的理解，在材料科学和最优控制中有应用价值

title: Linear inviscid damping for stably stratified Boussinesq flows
summary:
We study the linear asymptotic stability of stably stratified monotone shear
flows for the Boussinesq equations in the periodic channel. By means of the
limiting absorption principle, we obtain a precise description of the inviscid
damping experienced by the perturbed velocity field and density, with
time-decay rates that depend on the local Richardson number $\mathcal{J}(y)$
and split into four stratification regimes (non-stratified, weak, mild, and
strong) reflecting qualitative changes in the structure of the Green's function
at the critical thresholds $\mathcal{J}(y)=0$ and $\mathcal{J}(y) = \frac14$.
The velocity and density decay estimates are later used to prove quantitative
sub-linear growth of the vorticity and gradient of density. As a byproduct of
our analysis, we show that, under mild hypotheses on the underlying shear-type
equilibrium, the spectrum of the linearised Boussinesq operator is purely
continuous.

AI.tldr: 研究了稳定分层单调剪切流在线性Boussinesq方程下的渐近稳定性，获得了依赖于局部Richardson数的精确阻尼衰减率
AI.motivation: 研究周期通道中稳定分层单调剪切流在线性Boussinesq方程下的渐近稳定性问题，分析扰动速度场和密度的衰减行为
AI.techniques: 使用极限吸收原理，分析Green函数在临界阈值处的结构变化，建立依赖于局部Richardson数的衰减估计
AI.main_theorems: 获得了速度场和密度的精确时间衰减率，证明了涡量和密度梯度的亚线性增长，并建立了线性化Boussinesq算子的纯连续谱性质
AI.significance: 首次系统揭示了分层剪切流稳定性对Richardson数的依赖性，为理解分层流体中的混合和输运过程提供了理论基础

title: Instantaneous Total Enhanced Dissipation For Very Rough Shear Flows
summary:
This paper investigates enhanced dissipation for a passive scalar advected by
"very rough" horizontal shear flows, described by an advection-diffusion
equation on the 2D torus. The authors extend results of Galeati and Gubinelli
(2023) to generic flows in negative Besov spaces, proving that the dissipation
rate increases to infinity as viscosity vanishes. This is obtained by deriving
(non-sharp) upper and lower bounds on the dissipation rate. The upper bound
holds for truly irregular velocities, namely those verifying a suitable version
of the Wei irregularity index (Wei (2021)). As a by-product, it follows that
for truly rough shear flows the vanishing viscosity solution to the
corresponding inviscid equation is trivial.

AI.tldr: 证明了在负Besov空间中非常粗糙的水平剪切流下，被动标量的增强耗散现象，获得了耗散率随粘度消失而趋于无穷的上下界估计。
AI.motivation: 研究二维环面上由非常粗糙的水平剪切流驱动的被动标量输运问题，扩展Galeati和Gubinelli (2023)的结果到负Besov空间中的一般流动，探讨增强耗散现象。
AI.techniques: 使用负Besov空间理论，Wei不规则性指数，推导耗散率的非尖锐上下界估计，分析粘性消失极限下的解行为。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于满足Wei不规则性指数的真正不规则速度场，耗散率随粘度消失而趋于无穷；对于真正粗糙的剪切流，相应无粘方程的粘性消失解是平凡的。
AI.significance: 扩展了增强耗散理论到更粗糙的流动情形，为理解不规则流场中的标量混合机制提供了理论框架，揭示了粗糙剪切流在粘性消失极限下的特殊行为。

title: Some existence and uniqueness results for infinity Laplace equations on infinite graphs
summary:
We study the Dirichlet problem of the following discrete infinity Laplace
equation on unbounded subgraphs
  \begin{equation*}
  \Delta_{\infty}u(x):=\inf_{y\sim x}u(y)+\sup_{y\sim x}u(y)-2u(x)=f(x).
  \end{equation*}
  For the homogeneous case ($f=0$), the existence and uniqueness of sublinear
solutions are established. This result is applied to prove the existence and
uniqueness of sublinear solutions for the homogeneous (normalized) infinity
Laplace equations on unbounded Euclidean domains. Uniqueness is also shown for
the case $f \geq 0$ on trees.

AI.tldr: 建立了无界子图上离散无穷拉普拉斯方程Dirichlet问题子线性解的存在唯一性理论
AI.motivation: 研究无界子图上离散无穷拉普拉斯方程Dirichlet问题的解理论，特别是子线性解的存在性和唯一性问题，并将结果应用于无界欧几里得域上的无穷拉普拉斯方程
AI.techniques: 使用离散无穷拉普拉斯算子的性质，结合无界图上的分析技术，通过比较原理和极值原理等方法处理子线性解的存在唯一性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 齐次情况(f=0)下无界子图上子线性解的存在唯一性定理；2. 将结果推广到无界欧几里得域上齐次无穷拉普拉斯方程；3. 在树上对f≥0情况的唯一性结果
AI.significance: 扩展了无穷拉普拉斯方程理论到无界区域和离散情形，为离散无穷调和函数理论提供了基础，建立了离散与连续情形之间的联系

title: Affine rigidity of functions with additive oscillation
summary:
We prove that a locally integrable function $f:(a,b) \to \mathbb R$ must be
affine if its mean oscillation, considered as a function of intervals, can be
extended to a locally finite Borel measure. In particular, we show that any
function $f$ satisfying the integro-differential identity
$|Df|(I)=4\text{osc}(f,I)$ for all intervals $I \subset {(a,b)}$ must be
affine.

AI.tldr: 证明了如果函数的平均振荡可以延拓为局部有限Borel测度，则该函数必须是仿射函数
AI.motivation: 研究函数振荡与测度理论之间的关系，探索何种函数性质能够保证其仿射性，特别是通过平均振荡的测度延拓性来刻画仿射函数
AI.techniques: 测度论、实分析、振荡分析、Borel测度延拓技术、积分-微分恒等式方法
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：若局部可积函数f的平均振荡（作为区间函数）可延拓为局部有限Borel测度，则f必须是仿射函数；特别地，满足积分-微分恒等式|Df|(I)=4osc(f,I)的函数也必须是仿射的
AI.significance: 建立了函数振荡性质与仿射性之间的深刻联系，为函数正则性理论提供了新的刻画方法，在变分法、偏微分方程和几何测度论中有潜在应用

title: A mixed eigenvalue problem on domains tending to infinity in several directions
summary:
The aim of this article is to analyze the asymptotic behaviour of the
eigenvalues of elliptic operators in divergence form with mixed boundary type
conditions for domains that become unbounded in several directions, while they
stay bounded in some directions (cylindrical domains). The limiting behavior of
such eigenvalues is shown to depend on an ensemble of eigenvalue problems
defined on a domain that is unbounded only in one direction. The asymptotic
behavior of the eigenfunctions are also discussed. This work is a continuation
of the work done in [6].

AI.tldr: 研究圆柱形无界区域上具有混合边界条件的椭圆算子特征值的渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究在部分方向有界、部分方向无界的圆柱形区域上，具有混合边界条件的椭圆算子特征值的渐近行为，这是对文献[6]工作的延续
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析方法，将多维无界区域问题约化为一系列一维无界区域上的特征值问题，分析特征值和特征函数的极限行为
AI.main_theorems: 证明了圆柱形无界区域上椭圆算子特征值的渐近行为由一系列仅在一个方向无界的区域上的特征值问题决定，并讨论了特征函数的渐近行为
AI.significance: 为无界区域上椭圆算子谱理论提供了新的渐近分析框架，对偏微分方程谱理论和量子力学中的薛定谔算子研究有重要意义

title: Improved refined bilinear estimates and well-posedness for generalized KdV type equations on $\mathbb{R}$
summary:
We study the Cauchy problem for one-dimensional dispersive equations posed on
$\mathbb{R} $, under the hypotheses that the dispersive operator behaves, for
high frequencies, as a Fourier multiplier by $ i |\xi|^\alpha \xi $ with $ 1
\le \alpha\le 2 $, and that the nonlinear term is of the form $ \partial_x f(u)
$ where $f $ is a real analytic function satisfying certain conditions. We
prove the unconditional local well-posedness of the Cauchy problem in
$H^s(\mathbb{R}) $ for $ s\ge \frac{5-2\alpha}{4} $ whenever $ 1\le
\alpha<\frac{3}{2} $, and for $ s>\frac{1}{2} $ whenever $\alpha\in
[\frac{3}{2},2] $. This result is optimal in the case $\alpha\ge \frac{3}{2}$
in view of the restriction $ s>\frac{1}{2} $ required for the continuous
embedding $ H^s(\mathbb{R}) \hookrightarrow L^\infty(\mathbb{R}) $. The main
novelty of this work, compared to our previous studies, is an improvement of
the refined linear and bilinear estimates on $\mathbb{R} $. Our local
well-posedness results enable us to derive global existence of solutions for $
\alpha \in [\frac{5}{4},2] $.

AI.tldr: 证明了高频率下行为类似 $i|\xi|^\alpha\xi$ 的一维色散方程在特定Sobolev空间中的无条件局部适定性
AI.motivation: 研究一维色散方程的Cauchy问题，其中色散算子在高频下行为类似 $i|\xi|^\alpha\xi$ (1≤α≤2)，非线性项为 $\partial_x f(u)$，f是满足特定条件的实解析函数。目标是建立无条件局部适定性理论。
AI.techniques: 改进了精细的线性和双线性估计，利用Sobolev嵌入理论和色散方程的分析技术，特别是针对高频行为的傅里叶乘子分析。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当1≤α<3/2时在 $H^s(\mathbb{R})$ 中 $s≥(5-2α)/4$ 的无条件局部适定性；当α∈[3/2,2]时在 $s>1/2$ 的无条件局部适定性。后者在α≥3/2时是最优的，因为需要 $s>1/2$ 来保证 $H^s(\mathbb{R}) \hookrightarrow L^\infty(\mathbb{R})$ 的连续嵌入。
AI.significance: 改进了之前研究的估计，建立了更优的适定性结果，并由此推导出当α∈[5/4,2]时的全局解存在性，对色散方程理论有重要推进。

title: Coexisting Automated and Human-Driven Vehicles: Well-Posedness of a Mixed Nonlocal-Local Traffic Model
summary:
We present a macroscopic traffic flow model where standard vehicles coexist
with vehicles informed on the traffic distribution. The resulting mixed
nonlocal-local integro-differential PDEs is proved to generate a locally
Lipschitz continuous semigroup whose orbits are uniquely characterized as
solutions to the system, according to a natural definition of solution. The
norms and function spaces adopted are intrinsic to the different nature of the
equations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个包含标准车辆和交通信息车辆共存的宏观交通流模型，建立了混合非局部-局部积分微分PDE系统的适定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究智能交通系统中标准车辆与信息车辆共存的交通流动力学，这类系统会产生混合的非局部-局部积分微分方程，需要建立其数学理论基础
AI.techniques: 采用半群理论方法，针对混合非局部-局部积分微分PDE系统，构建了适应方程不同性质的范数和函数空间，证明了局部Lipschitz连续半群的存在性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了混合非局部-局部积分微分PDE系统生成局部Lipschitz连续半群，轨道被唯一地表征为系统的解，并给出了自然解的定义
AI.significance: 为智能交通系统中的混合交通流模型提供了严格的数学基础，发展了处理混合非局部-局部PDE系统的新方法，对交通流理论和应用数学都有重要意义

title: Remarks on the Spatial Asymptotic Behavior of Solutions to a 1D Model of Equatorial Oceanic Flows
summary:
We consider a new nonlocal and nonlinear one-dimensional evolution model
arising in the study of oceanic flows in equatorial regions, recently derived
in [A. Constantin and L. Molinet, Global Existence and Finite-Time Blow-Up for
a Nonlinear Nonlocal Evolution Equation, Commun. Math. Phys. 402 (2023),
3233-3252].
  We investigate the spatial asymptotic behavior of its solutions. In
particular, we observe the influence of the Coriolis effect, which, even for
rapidly decaying initial data, yields solutions that decay at the rate $1 /
|x|$. Thereafter, we shed light on the optimality of this decay rate.

AI.tldr: 研究了赤道洋流非局部非线性演化方程解的空间渐近行为，揭示了科里奥利效应导致解以1/|x|速率衰减的最优性
AI.motivation: 研究赤道洋流模型中非局部非线性演化方程解的空间渐近行为，特别关注科里奥利效应对解衰减速率的影响
AI.techniques: 非局部演化方程分析、渐近行为分析、衰减速率估计、最优性证明
AI.main_theorems: 证明了即使初始数据快速衰减，科里奥利效应也会导致解以1/|x|速率衰减，并证明了该衰减速率的最优性
AI.significance: 为赤道洋流模型的物理理解提供数学基础，揭示了科里奥利效应在空间衰减中的关键作用，对非线性偏微分方程渐近理论有贡献

title: Orthogonality of H-distributions and applications
summary:
We extend G\'erard's results on orthogonality of ${\rm L}^2_{\rm loc}$
sequences as a consequence of mutual singularity of corresponding H-measures
(microlocal defect measures) to ${\rm L}^p$/${\rm L}^q$ sequences and newly
introduced notion of orhogonality for H-distributions. We apply the result to a
homogenisation problem for the heterogeneous Boltzmann equation with
space-dependent drift and periodic opacity.

AI.tldr: 将Gérard关于H-测度相互奇异导致L²序列正交性的结果推广到Lp/Lq序列，并应用于含空间依赖漂移和周期不透明度的异质Boltzmann方程均质化问题
AI.motivation: Gérard先前证明了当两个序列对应的H-测度（微局部分布测度）相互奇异时，它们的L²_loc序列正交。本文旨在将此结果推广到更一般的Lp/Lq序列，并引入H-分布的正交性概念，应用于异质Boltzmann方程的均质化问题
AI.techniques: 使用H-测度（微局部分布测度）理论，推广到Lp/Lq空间，引入H-分布的正交性概念，应用于Boltzmann方程的均质化分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 将Gérard的L²_loc序列正交性定理推广到Lp/Lq序列；2. 引入H-分布的正交性概念并建立相应结果；3. 应用于含空间依赖漂移和周期不透明度的异质Boltzmann方程均质化问题
AI.significance: 扩展了微局部分析在序列正交性方面的应用范围，为处理更一般的函数空间提供了理论工具，在Boltzmann方程均质化等应用问题中具有重要价值

title: On the global existence and uniform-in-time bounds for three-component reaction-diffusion systems with mass control and polynomial growth
summary:
We investigate a class of three-component reaction-diffusion systems subject
to mass control and a newly introduced structural assumption, referred to as
linear intermediate weighted sum condition. Under these hypotheses, we
establish the global existence of classical solutions in arbitrary spatial
dimensions and wide class of boundary conditions, even when the nonlinearities
exhibit arbitrary polynomial growth. We establish also that, under
slight-stronger assumptions and mixed boundary conditions, solutions admit
uniform-in-time bounds. Our approach relies on the extension of $L^p$-energy
polynomial functionals, together with the regularizing effect for parabolic
equations. Furthermore, we demonstrate the applicability of our framework by
analyzing three-species sub-skew-symmetric Lotka-Volterra systems with
higher-order interactions.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有质量控制和线性中间加权和条件的三组分反应扩散系统在任意空间维度和边界条件下全局经典解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有质量控制的三组分反应扩散系统，这类系统在生物学、化学和生态学中有广泛应用，但非线性项的多项式增长给全局解的存在性分析带来挑战
AI.techniques: 扩展的L^p-能量多项式泛函方法、抛物方程的正则化效应、线性中间加权和条件作为结构假设
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在任意空间维度和广泛边界条件下全局经典解的存在性；2. 在稍强假设和混合边界条件下解的一致时间有界性；3. 将框架应用于具有高阶相互作用的三物种亚斜对称Lotka-Volterra系统
AI.significance: 为具有多项式增长非线性的多组分反应扩散系统提供了统一的全局存在性理论框架，特别适用于生态学和化学中的三物种相互作用模型

title: Regularity for quasilinear elliptic equations in metric measure spaces
summary:
In the present article we prove second-order and Lipschitz regularity for
quasilinear elliptic equations in metric spaces endowed with a lower bound on
the Ricci curvature. The estimates we obtain are quantitative and cover a large
class of elliptic equations with polynomial growth. As a particular case we
settle the Lipschitz regularity of $p$-harmonic functions for all values of
$p\in(1,\infty)$, proving also a Cheng-Yau type inequality. These results are
the first in this setting that simultaneously address a wide family of elliptic
operators and extend beyond the classical H\"older regularity theory. Our
strategy rests on the use of Galerkin's method, which we employ as an
alternative to the traditional difference quotients technique.

AI.tldr: 在Ricci曲率有下界的度量空间中，证明了拟线性椭圆方程的二阶和Lipschitz正则性，首次统一处理了广泛的椭圆算子族并超越了经典的Hölder正则性理论。
AI.motivation: 研究度量空间中拟线性椭圆方程的正则性理论，特别是在Ricci曲率有下界的度量测度空间（如RCD空间）中。传统方法主要关注Hölder正则性，本文旨在建立更强的Lipschitz和二阶正则性估计，覆盖包括p-Laplace方程在内的广泛椭圆算子族。
AI.techniques: 采用Galerkin方法作为传统差分商技术的替代方案，利用度量测度空间的几何结构（Ricci曲率下界），结合变分原理和能量估计，建立定量正则性估计。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在Ricci曲率有下界的度量空间中，证明了拟线性椭圆方程的二阶正则性；2. 建立了Lipschitz正则性估计，覆盖多项式增长的椭圆方程类；3. 特别地，对所有p∈(1,∞)证明了p-调和函数的Lipschitz正则性；4. 建立了Cheng-Yau型不等式。
AI.significance: 这是首次在度量空间框架下统一处理广泛椭圆算子族的Lipschitz和二阶正则性，超越了经典的Hölder理论。结果具有定量特征，为RCD空间和非光滑几何中的偏微分方程理论提供了新的正则性工具，特别是完全解决了p-调和函数的Lipschitz正则性问题。

title: The zero capillarity limit for the Euler-Korteweg system with no-flux boundary conditions
summary:
In this article, we study the small dispersion limit of the Euler-Korteweg
system in a bounded domain with no-flux boundary conditions. We exploit a
relative entropy approach to study the convergence of finite energy weak
solutions towards strong solutions to the compressible Euler system. Since we
consider non-trivial boundary conditions, our approach needs a correction for
the limiting particle density, due to the appearance of a (weak) boundary
layer. We believe this approach can be adapted to study similar singular limits
involving non-trivial boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 利用相对熵方法研究有界域中带无通量边界条件的Euler-Korteweg系统小耗散极限的收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究有界域中带非平凡边界条件的Euler-Korteweg系统的小耗散极限问题，特别关注边界层效应对收敛性的影响
AI.techniques: 相对熵方法，边界层校正技术，有限能量弱解分析，强解收敛性证明
AI.main_theorems: 证明了有限能量弱解向可压缩Euler系统强解的收敛性，建立了带边界层校正的收敛理论
AI.significance: 为处理非平凡边界条件下的奇异极限问题提供了新方法，可推广到其他类似极限问题的研究
